title: Stormlight
description: Emulates a few aspects from Stormlight
body:
### Requires Origins and Geckolib

In this mod I tried to implement what I could from Brandon Sanderson’s Stormlight series.

Using origins I have made an origin from each order as well as for each known fused brand. There is a total of 17 origins.

I have also implemented a high storm feature where when a player is outside in a thunderstorm, they will be pushed to the west.

There are 7 new gems, spheres, and “Stormlight”. 
To infuse spheres, throw them out in a thunderstorm.
To get void light, make a void light infuser and place the spheres within.

A list of origins and power is shown below:

## **Knights Radiant**

### **Windrunner**: 
Surgebinder of Adhesion and Gravitation.
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Adhesion: 
You can press [Secondary] to stick every entity around you to the ground for 5 seconds.
+ Gravitation: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become weightless and press [W] fly in the direction you are looking. to slow down you can press [S]



### **Skybreaker**
Surgebinder of Gravitation and Division
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Gravitation: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become weightless and press [W] fly in the direction you are looking. to slow down you can press [S]
+ Division: 
You can press [Secondary] to convert all logs into charcoal, and all bricks into their cracked variants. Aswell as apply a short wither to all entities within 2 blocks of you.


### **Dustbringer**
Surgebinder of Division and Abrasion
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Abrasion: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become Extremely slippery and fast.
+ Division: 
You can press [Secondary] to convert all logs into charcoal, and all bricks into their cracked variants. Aswell as apply a short wither to all entities within 2 blocks of you.


### **Edgedancer**
Surgebinder of Abrasion and Progression
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Abrasion: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become Extremely slippery and fast.
+ Progression: 
You can press [Secondary] to grow the plant you are looking at as well as heal any entity, within 3 blocks that you are looking at, for 1 heart.


### **Truthwatcher**
Surgebinder of Progression and Illumination
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Progression: 
You can press [Secondary] to grow the plant you are looking at as well as heal any entity, within 3 blocks that you are looking at, for 1 heart.
+ Illumination: 
You can press your [Primary] key to summon 8 copies of you and become invisible.


### **Lightweaver**
Surgebinder of Illumination and Transformation
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Illumination: 
You can press your [Primary] key to summon 8 copies of you and become invisible.
+ Transformation: 
You can press [Secondary] while holding an infused sphere to soulcast the block you are looking at into the essence associated with the gemstone. Light will still be consumed if block is not in range. Emerald=Hay, Sapphire=Air+fills bubbles, Smokestone=Smoke+damage nearby, Ruby=fire, Diamond=glass, Garnet=heal entities, Zircon=ink, Amethyst=iron, Topaz=stone, Heliodor=beef.


### **Elsecaller**
Surgebinder of Transformation and Transportation
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Transportation: 
You can press your [Primary] key to be transported to shadesmar. Be warned, you will fall through all blocks except water. You cannot come back unless you run out of stormlight. You cannot interact with anything while there.
+ Transformation: 
You can press [Secondary] while holding an infused sphere to soulcast the block you are looking at into the essence associated with the gemstone. Light will still be consumed if block is not in range. Emerald=Hay, Sapphire=Air+fills bubbles, Smokestone=Smoke+damage nearby, Ruby=fire, Diamond=glass, Garnet=heal entities, Zircon=ink, Amethyst=iron, Topaz=stone, Heliodor=beef.


### **Willshaper**
Surgebinder of Transportation and Cohesion
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Transportation: 
You can press your [Primary] key to be transported to shadesmar. Be warned, you will fall through all blocks except water. You cannot come back unless you run out of stormlight. You cannot interact with anything while there.
+ Cohesion: 
By pressing your [Primary] you can toggle your cohesion power. This will let you break all stone by simply walking into it.


### **Stoneward**
Surgebinder of Cohesion and Tension
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Cohesion: 
By pressing your [Primary] you can toggle your cohesion power. This will let you break all stone by simply walking into it.
+ Tension: 
You can press your [Secondary] key to Break all stone in a straight line in front of you.


### **Bondsmith**
Surgebinder of Adhesion and Connection.
+ Stormlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having stormlight in your system. you can heal quickly, can breath underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Stormlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding infused spheres you will absorb the stormlight
+ Adhesion: 
You can press [Secondary] to stick every entity around you to the ground for 5 seconds.
+ Honor's Perpendicularity: 
You can press your [Secondary] key to bridge the three realms, and feed stormlight to everyone within 50 blocks of you.


## **Fused**

### **Fannahn-im**
Fused with the power of Transformation.
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Transformation: 
You can press [Secondary] while holding an infused sphere to soulcast the block you are looking at into the essence associated with the gemstone. Light will still be consumed if the block is not in range. Emerald=Hay, Sapphire=Air+fills bubbles, Smokestone=Smoke+damage nearby, Ruby=fire, Diamond=glass, Garnet=heal entities, Zircon=ink, Amethyst=iron, Topaz=stone, Heliodor=beef.


### **Magnified One**
Fused with the power of Progression
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Grow Carapace: 
By pressing [Primary] you can consume half of your voidlight and grow a full set of carapace armor as well as a full set of carapace tools.


### **Makay-im**
Fused with the power of Cohesion
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Meld: 
By pressing [Primary] you can Meld with stone, allowing you to pass through it.


### **Mavset-im**
Fused with the power of Illumination
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Disguise: 
By pressing [Primary] you can disguise as a villager until you press [Primary] again.


### **Nex-im**
Fused with the power of Transportation
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Evade: 
By pressing [Primary] you can become a wisp. You can fly but cannot interact with anything. By pressing [Primary] again you will create a new body.


### **Shanay-im**
Fused with the power of Gravitation
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Gravitation: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become weightless and press [W] fly in the direction you are looking. to slow down you can press [S]


### **Shetel-im**
Fused with the power of Abrasion
+ Voidlight: 
You gain a few benefits of having Voidlight in your system. You can heal quickly, can breathe underwater, and have slight speed and strength.
+ Breath Voidlight: 
By pressing [C] while holding void infused spheres you will absorb the voidlight.
+ Transport to Braize: 
When you die you are sent to Braize. you are imprisoned there for a day(in game). after which you can choose to be sent back to roshar(overworld), by pressing [Secondary]
+ Abrasion: 
You can press your [Primary] key to become Extremely slippery and fast.
